title: gilia graciosa
intro: Gilia graciosa, also known as the starflower, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Polemoniaceae family and is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Gilia graciosa include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Gilia graciosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
